/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ConjugateGradientSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/NeoHookean.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Quadrature.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ShapeFunction.cpp.o -o main  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
